display_text: Tier 5 Token, Tier 5: Neutral item token that can be activated to redeem a random, non-shareable Tier 5 neutral item. This token allows a hero to unlock one of the game's most powerful late-game neutral effects. A hero can only redeem one token per tier. Stats: No cooldown, no mana cost.
